name: 9mm-v3-position-manager
description: Auto-rebalancing position manager for 9mm v3 (Uniswap v3 fork) on PulseChain

scripts.reset-wallet: rm -f .wallet.json; echo 'Wallet cleared — re-import via dashboard on next start'
scripts.clean:
npm run stop 2>/dev/null; npm run reset-wallet && rm -f .bot-config.json .epoch-cache.json rebalance_log.json tmp/event-cache*.json tmp/lp-position-cache*.json tmp/pnl-epochs-cache.json tmp/nft-mint-date-cache.json tmp/historical-price-cache.json && echo 'Cleaned: server stopped, wallet, bot config, epoch cache, rebalance log, event cache, price cache' && printf '
💡 \033[1;30;43m TIP: Also clear browser localStorage & cookies via the Settings gear icon in the dashboard. \033[0m

'
scripts.dev-clean:
npm run stop 2>/dev/null; npm run reset-wallet && rm -f .bot-config.json .epoch-cache.json rebalance_log.json tmp/event-cache*.json tmp/lp-position-cache*.json tmp/pnl-epochs-cache.json tmp/nft-mint-date-cache.json && echo 'Dev-cleaned: price cache preserved for fast restart' && printf '
💡 \033[1;30;43m TIP: Also clear browser localStorage & cookies via the Settings gear icon in the dashboard. \033[0m

'
scripts.lint: eslint src/ test/ server.js bot.js public/dashboard-*.js eslint-rules/ --max-warnings 0 && stylelint public/*.css && html-validate public/*.html && markdownlint-cli2 README.md CLAUDE.md docs/CLAUDE-SECURITY.md docs/CLAUDE-BEST-PRACTICES.md docs/CLAUDE-TESTING.md docs/architecture.md
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src/ test/ server.js bot.js public/dashboard-*.js eslint-rules/ --fix && stylelint public/*.css --fix && html-validate public/*.html && markdownlint-cli2 --fix README.md CLAUDE.md docs/CLAUDE-SECURITY.md docs/CLAUDE-BEST-PRACTICES.md docs/CLAUDE-TESTING.md
scripts.nuke: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && echo 'Nuked node_modules + package-lock.json — run npm install to reinstall'
